title: [Lake of Fear, South Dock]
description: Water laps about the pilings that hold up the greying surface of the wooden dock, the only sound to be heard across the eerily silent lake.  A thick coil of rope lies at the edge of the dock, waiting for the next boat to arrive.  A small wooden sign is tacked to the dock's sturdy railing.

Water laps about the pilings that hold up the greying surface of the wooden dock, the only sound to be heard across the dark and eerily silent lake.  A thick coil of rope lies at the edge of the dock, waiting for the next boat to arrive.  A small wooden sign is tacked to the dock's sturdy railing.

wayto.10117:
;e move 'go gangplank'
if Room.current.id == 10119
echo 'Waiting for ferry... '
waitfor 'An elven crewmember scrambles back onto the boat and lowers the gangplank.'
move 'go gangplank'
end
waitfor 'An elven crewmember scrambles back onto the boat and lowers the gangplank.'
move 'out'
